nav.feedEmptyDesc: Once your playbooks run their first analysis, reports will appear here.

library.heading: Dashboard
library.noSources: No sources in this library yet.
library.emptyDesc: Sources are the YouTube channels, podcasts, and websites ChatTrader reads on your behalf.
library.noWorkflowCta: No analysis workflows for this source yet. Add it to a playbook to start generating reports.
library.youtubeTranscriptNote: Full transcripts may be unavailable for this source when running from a datacenter IP — show notes only as fallback.
library.reportsWillAppearHere: Results will appear here after an analysis.
library.removeAgentConfirmDescription: The agent remains available and is not deleted.
library.removeAgentFromSourceFailed: Could not remove the agent from this source.

feedCard.noFullReport: This report has no detailed content yet.

listen.stepSubtitle: Choose an AI agent to summarize this source and generate reports for you. No agents yet? Create one below.

agent.emptyDesc: Analysts are AI personas with a system prompt. Each one reads your sources with its own character and trading philosophy.
agent.emptySourceHint: Tip: add a source in the Library first so your analyst has something to read.
agent.deleteConfirmDesc: This removes the agent from all library cards that use it. Those cards will return to an 'Unsummarized' state.
agent.validationName: Give the agent a name to continue.
agent.validationRisk: Risk level is required for Finance Expert.
agent.agentCreated: Agent "{{name}}" created — review schedule and save.

schedule.intro: Your agent will automatically scan this source and generate a report on the schedule below. Set how often it should run and who should receive the results by email.
schedule.recipientsPlaceholder: Add one or more email addresses
schedule.recipientsHint: Leave empty to skip email delivery. You can add recipients later.

playbook.emptyDesc: Playbooks connect a source to an analyst on a schedule and email you reports automatically.
playbook.emptyCtaNoSources: Add a source in the Library first
playbook.emptyCtaNoAgents: Create an analyst in the Agents hub first

marketplace.heading: Marketplace
marketplace.sourcesDesc: Ready-made sources shared by the community. Clone one to add it to your library.
marketplace.emptyHeadline: No sources in the marketplace yet
marketplace.emptyDesc: The marketplace is empty right now. Add your own sources from the Library.
marketplace.quickStartDesc: Follow a popular playbook to get your first report instantly.

onboarding.gettingStartedDesc: Complete these steps to set up your first automated report.
onboarding.step1Desc: Add a YouTube channel, podcast, or website to your library.
onboarding.step2Desc: Set up an AI analyst with a trading persona and system prompt.
onboarding.step3Desc: Connect a source to an analyst on a schedule to get reports.
onboarding.step4Desc: Trigger a manual run or wait for the schedule — your first signal report will appear here.
onboarding.allDone: 🎉 You're all set! Reports will arrive on schedule.

runs.noRuns: No history yet. Analysis history appears here once the agent's schedule kicks in (or you trigger a manual run).
runs.noErrorDetails: No further details are available for this failure.

usage.title: AI usage & monthly budget
usage.noBudget: No monthly budget set — runs are never blocked by cost.
usage.budgetHint: When estimated spend reaches the budget, new agent runs are blocked until next month (or until you raise/remove the budget).
usage.budgetReached: Budget reached — new runs are blocked until next month.

watchlist.title: My watchlist
watchlist.hint: Star a symbol on any report to follow it — you'll get an email whenever it appears in a new report.
watchlist.follow: Follow symbol (email alert on new signals)

reportChat.title: Ask the analyst
reportChat.empty: Ask a follow-up question about this report — the analyst answers grounded in the report and its sources.
reportChat.placeholder: e.g. Why is the confidence for AAPL so high?
reportChat.disclaimer: Answers are grounded in this report and its sources. Informational analysis only — not financial advice.

auth.title: ChatTrader
auth.subtitle: Sign in to manage your AI trading agents.
auth.confirmationSub: We sent a confirmation link to {{email}}. Click it to activate your account and start tracking.
auth.confirmationSpamHint: Didn't receive it? Check your spam folder.
auth.bannerEmailConfirmed: Your email has been confirmed. You can now log in.
auth.bannerEmailInvalid: That confirmation link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
auth.bannerAccountLocked: This account has been locked. Contact an administrator for help.
auth.bannerResetSent: If that email is registered, a reset link is on its way.
auth.bannerPasswordReset: Your password has been reset. You can now log in.
auth.valueProp1: 📚 Add sources — YouTube channels, podcasts, websites
auth.valueProp2: 🤖 Create analysts — AI personas with a trading philosophy
auth.valueProp3: 📬 Get reports — Automated signal reports in your inbox

guided.title: Get your first report in 2 minutes
guided.step1Desc: Paste a YouTube channel URL, podcast feed, or any website you want to track.
guided.step2Desc: Pick an analyst persona — each has a different focus and style.
guided.step3Desc: We'll create your source, analyst, and playbook, then run the first analysis now.
guided.success: Your first report is running! Check the Feed in a moment.
guided.error: Something went wrong. Try again or set up manually.

admin.seedDemoSuccess: Demo data seeded! Refresh to see it.
admin.seedDemoAlreadyExists: Demo data already seeded for this account.

finance_expert.name: Finance Expert
finance_expert.tagline: Signals-focused equity analysis and risk-aware market interpretation.

conservative-analyst.name: Conservative Analyst
conservative-analyst.tagline: Blue-chip focus, high evidence bar, cautious on long/short calls.
conservative-analyst.intro: I keep my powder dry. Hard numbers first — if the evidence isn't concrete, I stay quiet.

balanced-analyst.name: Balanced Analyst
balanced-analyst.intro: I weigh both sides before picking a direction. Solid analysis, no drama, always cite the source.

aggressive-momentum-trader.name: Aggressive Momentum Trader
aggressive-momentum-trader.tagline: Fast-moving, hype and sentiment driven, higher signal volume.
aggressive-momentum-trader.intro: I move fast and chase conviction. Sentiment counts — first in wins.

contrarian-value-investor.name: Contrarian Value Investor
contrarian-value-investor.tagline: Looks for oversold/undervalued names the crowd has given up on.
contrarian-value-investor.intro: Everyone's wrong sometimes. I look for the names the crowd gave up on too early.

quant-data-driven-analyst.name: Quant / Data-Driven Analyst
quant-data-driven-analyst.tagline: Numbers-only: requires explicit financial metrics before signaling.
quant-data-driven-analyst.intro: No numbers, no signal. I only speak when there's something measurable to say.

short-seller-skeptic.name: Short-Seller / Skeptic
short-seller-skeptic.tagline: Hunts for red flags, overhype, and fraud/accounting concerns.
short-seller-skeptic.intro: Show me the red flags. I find trouble before you stumble into it.

macro-thematic-strategist.name: Macro / Thematic Strategist
macro-thematic-strategist.tagline: Sector rotation and macro-theme driven calls (rates, AI, energy).
macro-thematic-strategist.intro: I tie individual names to the big picture — rates, AI cycles, sector rotations.

teacher.name: Teacher
teacher.tagline: Explains ideas step-by-step for learning and retention.

teacher-mentor.name: Mentor
teacher-mentor.intro: I guide you step by step — think of me as your personal learning companion.

teacher-classroom-instructor.name: Classroom Instructor
teacher-classroom-instructor.intro: Clear structure, steady checkpoints. I make complex ideas easy to follow.

teacher-practical-coach.name: Practical Coach
teacher-practical-coach.intro: Skip the theory. I give you hands-on examples you can use right away.

influencer.name: Influencer
influencer.tagline: Creates audience-ready narratives and content angles.

influencer-trend-scout.name: Trend Scout
influencer-trend-scout.tagline: Finds timely themes and attention hooks.
influencer-trend-scout.intro: I sniff out what's trending before the crowd notices. Hooks first, always.

influencer-storyteller.name: Storyteller
influencer-storyteller.intro: Every data point has a story. I craft the narrative that makes people listen.

influencer-campaign-strategist.name: Campaign Strategist
influencer-campaign-strategist.intro: I turn insights into messaging plans your audience will actually act on.

trainer.name: Trainer
trainer.tagline: Builds repeatable practice routines and performance drills.

trainer-drill-sergeant.name: Drill Sergeant
trainer-drill-sergeant.intro: Repetition is key. I push you until the right habits stick — no excuses.

trainer-supportive-coach.name: Supportive Coach
trainer-supportive-coach.intro: Progress over perfection. I keep you moving forward with encouragement.

trainer-exam-prep.name: Exam Prep Trainer
trainer-exam-prep.tagline: Targets likely test points and recall drills.
trainer-exam-prep.intro: Focused recall drills on the topics that matter most. Let's get you ready.

philosopher.name: Philosopher
philosopher.tagline: Interprets ideas through reasoning, assumptions, and ethics.

philosopher-socratic-guide.name: Socratic Guide
philosopher-socratic-guide.intro: I answer your questions with better questions. Assumptions deserve scrutiny.

philosopher-critical-thinker.name: Critical Thinker
philosopher-critical-thinker.intro: I stress-test every argument. If the logic doesn't hold, I'll find the crack.

philosopher-ethics-analyst.name: Ethics Analyst
philosopher-ethics-analyst.intro: Decisions have consequences beyond the obvious. I keep the bigger picture honest.

summarizer.name: Summarizer
summarizer.tagline: Distills complex inputs into concise decision-ready takeaways.

summarizer-executive-briefer.name: Executive Briefer
summarizer-executive-briefer.tagline: Top-line brief for fast executive decisions.
summarizer-executive-briefer.intro: Top-line only. I give you the signal without the noise — fast.

summarizer-research-digestor.name: Research Digestor
summarizer-research-digestor.tagline: Turns noisy inputs into focused research notes.
summarizer-research-digestor.intro: Dense inputs, focused output. I turn chaos into a clean research note.

summarizer-action-planner.name: Action Planner
summarizer-action-planner.tagline: Converts insights into prioritized action items.
summarizer-action-planner.intro: Insights are useless unless they drive action. I turn findings into next steps.

studio.title: Studio
studio.emptyDesc: Pick two or more agents and let them debate their findings. The transcript becomes a new source in your Library.
studio.noRuns: No runs yet — click "Run now" to generate the first discussion.
studio.runPending: This run hasn't produced any turns yet.
studio.topicStepIntro: Choose what the discussion should be grounded in.
studio.grounding_reports_desc: Experts discuss based on their analysis reports.
studio.grounding_reports_hint: In the "Material" step you'll pick the specific reports per expert — or let the latest ones be used automatically.
studio.grounding_transcript_desc: All experts read the same downloaded transcript.
studio.grounding_free_desc: Experts argue from their own expertise.
studio.transcriptPickerEmpty: No transcripts yet — run an agent that downloads episodes first.
studio.transcriptRequired: Please select at least one transcript
studio.freeQuestionPlaceholder: e.g. Should Germany reinvest in nuclear power?
studio.warmup1: Sound check — one, two, one, two…
studio.warmup3: Skimming the latest reports one more time… 📊
studio.audioNotConfigured: Audio rendering is not configured — set GOOGLE_TTS_CREDENTIALS / GOOGLE_TTS_API_KEY (or OPENAI_API_KEY) on the backend
studio.discussionSuggestion: {{agentA}} and {{agentB}} both analysed {{source}} — start a discussion?
studio.materialStepIntro: Pick specific reports for each agent, or leave a agent's selection empty to automatically use their latest reports.
studio.reportPickerFallbackHint: No reports selected — the latest {{limit}} reports will be used automatically.
studio.reportPickerEmpty: No reports yet for this agent — the latest reports will be used once available.
studio.agendaPlaceholder: e.g. What's the near-term outlook for NVDA, and where do you disagree?
studio.evidenceNoAgenda: No agenda was set for this run.
studio.evidenceLegacyRun: This run was created before evidence tracking was added — no snapshot is available.
